name: Accordion
description: Organizes content in expandable sections with collapsible panels.
import: import { Accordion, AccordionGroup, AccordionHeader, AccordionPanel } from "@salt-ds/core";

disabled.description: Whether the accordion is disabled and cannot be expanded or collapsed

indicatorSide.description: Position of the expand/collapse indicator icon (chevron)

status.description: Visual status indicator for the accordion content

value.description: Optional. When provided, identifies the accordion in a controlled group pattern. Use with AccordionGroup for controlled expand/collapse state.

expanded.description: Whether the accordion is expanded. Use for controlled mode; when provided, the component is fully controlled.

defaultExpanded.description: Whether the accordion is expanded by default. Use for uncontrolled mode; allows the component to manage its own state.

onToggle.description: Callback fired when the accordion is toggled (expanded or collapsed)

slots.children: AccordionGroup, Accordion, AccordionHeader, or AccordionPanel elements

keyboard: Tab — moves focus to accordion header
Shift+Tab — moves focus from accordion header
aria: aria-expanded — indicates expanded (true) or collapsed (false) state
aria-controls — links header to the panel it controls
aria-labelledby — links AccordionPanel to its AccordionHeader
